wins: Record Q4 revenue of $22.1 billion, up 22% sequentially and 265% year-on-year
Data Center revenue of $18.4 billion, up 27% sequentially and 409% year-on-year
Hopper GPU and InfiniBand networking drove significant growth
Strong adoption of AI across multiple industries including automotive, healthcare, and financial services
NVIDIA AI infrastructure is being used in AI factories for generative AI
risks: China Data Center revenue declined significantly due to export controls
Next generation products may face supply constraints
Competition in the AI infrastructure market is increasing
Uncertainty around the long-term demand for AI inference and training
Potential challenges in maintaining high gross margins as the market evolves
